title: Warm Indian Lamb Pasta
description: A peppery, velvety weeknight dish with halal lamb, linguine, and a creamy Indian spice blend.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add halal ground lamb, breaking it apart, and cook until browned and no longer pink, about 8 minutes, ensuring internal temp reaches 63°C.
Mix in tomato paste, garam masala, turmeric, and cumin; cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in heavy cream, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 5 minutes until sauce thickens slightly.
Meanwhile, cook linguine in salted boiling water according to package, then drain.
Toss cooked linguine with the lamb sauce, garnish with chopped cilantro, and serve hot.
